transactions.desc: Henry was optioned to Triple-A Rochester after allowed four runs on three hits and one walk while striking out two over 1.2 innings Monday against the Astros.
The Blue Jays reinstated Springer (personal) from the family emergency medical list Monday.
Duran was added to the 40-man roster Monday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.
Robinson was designated for assignment by the Dodgers on Monday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.
Gervase was optioned to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
Phillips (elbow) was reinstated from the 60-day injured list Monday.
The Twins optioned Laweryson to Triple-A St. Paul on Monday.
The Orioles optioned Weston to Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Athletics optioned Morris to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
The Giants claimed Cerantola off waivers from the Royals on Monday.
The Red Sox designated Anderson for assignment Monday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Red Sox optioned Gamboa to Triple-A Worcester on Monday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Red Sox reinstated Sandoval (biceps) from the 60-day injured list Monday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Diamondbacks optioned Del Castillo to Triple-A Reno on Monday.
The Diamondbacks activated McCann (quadriceps) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
Atlanta selected Azocar's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Monday.
Atlanta designated Camargo for assignment Monday.
The Cardinals recalled Graceffo from Triple-A Memphis on Monday, Dani Wexelman of Cardinals.tv reports.
The Astros optioned Delgado (finger) to Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.

The Astros reinstated Shewmake (adductor) from the 10-day injured list Monday, and he'll start at shortstop and bat eighth in the team's series opener in Washington, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Nationals recalled Henry from Triple-A Rochester on Monday.
The Rays recalled Roycroft from Triple-A Durham on Monday.
The Rays optioned Englert to Triple-A Durham on Monday.
Atlanta designated Carrasco for assignment Monday.
Atlanta recalled Ritchie from Triple-A Gwinnett on Monday.
Atlanta selected Murphy's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Monday.
The Detroit Tigers traded RHP Matt Seelinger to the New York Mets.
The Mariners promoted Montes from Double-A Arkansas to Triple-A Tacoma on Sunday, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.
The Pirates released Wendzel on Sunday.
The Athletics released Kelly on Sunday.
